name: Ascent
short_description: Ascent is an esoteric 2D platformer about a creature stuck in a 2D world
detailed_description: Ascent is a 2D platformer. You will need to go through a few levels. Each level has varying difficulty. The essence of the game is to activate the portal, which is located at the very end of the level. After studying all the tests, you will need to defeat the boss.
about_the_game: Ascent is a 2D platformer. You will need to go through a few levels. Each level has varying difficulty. The essence of the game is to activate the portal, which is located at the very end of the level. After studying all the tests, you will need to defeat the boss.
